properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I heard Your call and I answered, You set me on track Started to run in the finals, as all other ages were passed You showed me the eternal, what lays at the end of the road That huge portion of heaven, my reward, my aim, my goal

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are my prize at the end of the race You are my portion, no one can replace By Your grace alone I'll endure to the end of my course

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: The strait way laid before me, in which I tried to abide The word of God held the secret to reach the end, it's the guide There were footprints I could follow of those who ran before The narrow path they have chosen, seeing the invisible they endured

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Now I’ll look back and see the way I've come, encountering so many things All my defeats, all my victories, we know what life brings So I pause and consider, this book of life You wrote of me Knowing all my future victories are locked up in my history

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Onward I run staying focused, Purposed in heart to endure This race that was not given to the swift, the battle that’s not for the strong So with the faith that is within' me, I rise, these hurdles to cross Looking unto the Author and Finisher, Jesus, my eternal reward
